title: helichrysum graveolens
intro: Helichrysum graveolens, also known as Everlasting Flower, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Helichrysum graveolens include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support skin health, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce stress levels. Helichrysum graveolens can be prepared into various herbal products, such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
